series_metadata.series_title: GAF-25 CAS Reports & Inquiries by Data C
series_metadata.series_description: These are various computer generated reports dis- tributed by OBM to various state agencies. They fall into the following class ifications: a. Appropriation; b. Trial Balance; c. Vendor; d. Grant; e. Cap- ital Project; f. Revenue; g. Spending; h. Cash

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 4 years, then destroy pro- vided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released., Paper: Wastepaper
